subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #025 The Holy Spirit
subcodes.first_line: By the Holy Spirit is meant the outpouring grace of God and the effulgent rays that emanate from His Manifestation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از روح القدس فیض الهی است و اشعهء ساطعهٴ از مظهر ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @The Holy Spirit, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @predictions and prophecies
